name: io.github.dumbspacecookie/openeye
description: Persistent memory + visual session tracking + RL trajectory capture for AR/XR/mobile procedure verification. FTS5 search across past agent sessions and frame descriptions. Bring your own vision model.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for the agent. Required because the default OpenEye agent uses Claude. Swap providers via src/models.ts if you want OPENAI/GROQ/GEMINI/etc.

environmentVariables.name: OPENEYE_CONTEXT_OPTIN
environmentVariables.description: Set true to opt in to sharing trajectory data with Context's training pipeline. Default off. Loud opt-in by design — read docs/context-data.md before flipping.

environmentVariables.name: OPENEYE_CONTEXT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Context API key. Only needed if OPENEYE_CONTEXT_OPTIN is true.
